content: agent2: implementing auto_reload cache invalidation feature in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader). Will touch loaders.py only. Let me know if you're also editing this file.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. My changes only touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ (new auto_reload param) and add two new methods (_get_template_name, _on_template_changed) plus one line in get_source (tracking environments). Looks like we're on separate working copies so no direct conflict — each submitting our own patch.txt independently.
